use_cases: Displaying product or service features in a grid layout
Highlighting key benefits with icons and descriptions
Creating interactive feature sections with hover effects
Building landing pages with multiple feature showcases
Providing navigation to detailed feature pages via CTA links
ai_summary: A reusable, dark-mode-compatible feature card component with hover animations. Displays an icon, title, description, optional badge, and a 'Learn More' call-to-action with arrow animation. Designed for showcasing product features in grid layouts on landing pages and marketing sites, with subtle lift and shadow effects on hover.
